login.description: Choose a sign-in method to view your Minecraft profile information.
login.unavailable: No sign-in methods are available. Ask the administrator to configure one.

profile.noPlayers: You have not added any Minecraft profiles yet.

upload.title: Upload a YSM model and authorize it
upload.description: The model will be uploaded to the server auth directory, then reloaded and authorized for the selected profile.
upload.fileHint: Supports single-file .ysm, .zip, and .7z models. The server generates the model ID from the uploaded content.
